pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v7 — 11L INT6 + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9512, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer using depth-scaled residuals, uniform INT6 quant, and batched backward LoRA TTT per document for compact eval adaptation.
techniques: INT6 uniform quantization with depth-scaled residual scaling
LoRA TTT per document across multiple epochs and chunks
Fresh model copy plus short-doc threshold for stable evaluation
